about.title: About Interdiscount
about.description: Interdiscount is the leading omnichannel retailer in the home and consumer electronics sector in Switzerland. With around 170 stores and an attractive online shop, Interdiscount is always there for its customers. At Interdiscount you will find the best brands, the newest products, attractive prices, expert advice, a huge selection and top-quality services – around the clock.
